case_title: HAMPDEN-SYDNEY COLLEGE VS. DAVID A. HERZOG

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100214937) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMPDEN-SYDNEY COLLEGE AS TO DEFENDANT HERZOG, DAVID A.
